title: 'Netanyahu was not warned in advance': Israeli PM blindsided as Donald Trump scrapped Iran strike plans
summary_full: US President Donald Trump surprised Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu by cancelling planned strikes against Iran and announcing a potential diplomatic deal within days. Trump claimed Iran's leadership approved a draft framework, aiming to extend a ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Netanyahu, reportedly caught off guard, had urged continued military pressure, highlighting growing differences over Iran policy.
